revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
{{lua|Module:AfC topic}} {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} <!-- Add categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata --> This template is used by [[MediaWiki:AFC-submit-wizard.js]].
It takes only one parameter, which is 1–7 letter code. For a list of allowed topic codes, see the keys in [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Articles for creation/AfC topic map.json]]. The template causes categorisation of the page in the category indicated in the JSON page.
Use with an invalid code results in categorisation to [[:Category:AfC topic: invalid parameter]].
Usage outside draft and user namespaces results in categorisation to [[:Category:AfC topic used in wrong namespace]].
<includeonly>{{sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:WikiProject Articles for creation templates]] }}</includeonly>
<noinclude> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] </noinclude>

{{lua|Module:AfC topic}} {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} <!-- Add categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata --> This template is used by [[MediaWiki:AFC-submit-wizard.js]].
It takes only one parameter, which is 1–7 letter code. For a list of allowed topic codes, see the keys in [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Articles for creation/AfC topic map.json]]. The template causes categorisation of the page in the category indicated in the JSON page.
Use with an invalid code results in categorisation to [[:Category:AfC topic: invalid parameter]].
Usage outside draft and user namespaces results in categorisation to [[:Category:AfC topic used in wrong namespace]].
<includeonly>{{sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:WikiProject Articles for creation templates]] }}</includeonly>
<noinclude> [[Category:qq]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{lua|Module:AfC topic}} {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} <!-- Add categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata --> This template is used by [[MediaWiki:AFC-submit-wizard.js]].
It takes only one parameter, which is 1–7 letter code. For a list of allowed topic codes, see the keys in [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Articles for creation/AfC topic map.json]]. The template causes categorisation of the page in the category indicated in the JSON page.
Use with an invalid code results in categorisation to [[:Category:AfC topic: invalid parameter]].

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Removing from [[Category:Qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
{{lua|Module:AfC topic}} {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} <!-- Add categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata --> This template is used by [[MediaWiki:AFC-submit-wizard.js]].
It takes only one parameter, which is 1–7 letter code. For a list of allowed topic codes, see the keys in [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Articles for creation/AfC topic map.json]]. The template causes categorisation of the page in the category indicated in the JSON page.
Use with an invalid code results in categorisation to [[:Category:AfC topic: invalid parameter]].
Usage outside draft and user namespaces results in categorisation to [[:Category:AfC topic used in wrong namespace]].
<includeonly>{{sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line; interwikis at Wikidata --> [[Category:WikiProject Articles for creation templates]] }}</includeonly>
<noinclude> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
{{lua|Module:AfC topic}} {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} <!-- Add categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata --> This template is used by [[MediaWiki:AFC-submit-wizard.js]].
It takes only one parameter, which is 1–7 letter code. For a list of allowed topic codes, see the keys in [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Articles for creation/AfC topic map.json]]. The template causes categorisation of the page in the category indicated in the JSON page.
Use with an invalid code results in categorisation to [[:Category:AfC topic: invalid parameter]].

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 2 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23124421395|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{lua|Module:AfC topic}} {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} <!-- Add categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata --> This template is used by [[MediaWiki:AFC-submit-wizard.js]].
It takes only one parameter, which is 1–7 letter code. For a list of allowed topic codes, see the keys in [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Articles for creation/AfC topic map.json]]. The template causes categorisation of the page in the category indicated in the JSON page.
Use with an invalid code results in categorisation to [[:Category:AfC topic: invalid parameter]].
Usage outside draft and user namespaces results in categorisation to [[:Category:AfC topic used in wrong namespace]].

It takes only one parameter, which is 1–7 letter code. For a list of allowed topic codes, see the keys in [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Articles for creation/AfC topic map.json]]. The template causes categorisation of the page in the category indicated in the JSON page.

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=AfC_topic%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=AfC_topic%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{lua|Module:AfC topic}} {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} <!-- Add categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata --> This template is used by [[MediaWiki:AFC-submit-wizard.js]].
It takes only one parameter, which is 1–7 letter code. For a list of allowed topic codes, see the keys in [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Articles for creation/AfC topic map.json]]. The template causes categorisation of the page in the category indicated in the JSON page.
Use with an invalid code results in categorisation to [[:Category:AfC topic: invalid parameter]].
Usage outside draft and user namespaces results in categorisation to [[:Category:AfC topic used in wrong namespace]].
<includeonly>{{sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line; interwikis at Wikidata --> }}</includeonly>
<noinclude> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:WikiProject Articles for creation templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Pages without wikidata]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=AfC_topic%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24796114356|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=AfC_topic%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24796114356|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{lua|Module:AfC topic}} {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} <!-- Add categories where indicated at the bottom of this page and interwikis at Wikidata --> This template is used by [[MediaWiki:AFC-submit-wizard.js]].
It takes only one parameter, which is 1–7 letter code. For a list of allowed topic codes, see the keys in [[Wikipedia:WikiProject Articles for creation/AfC topic map.json]]. The template causes categorisation of the page in the category indicated in the JSON page.
Use with an invalid code results in categorisation to [[:Category:AfC topic: invalid parameter]].
Usage outside draft and user namespaces results in categorisation to [[:Category:AfC topic used in wrong namespace]].
<includeonly>{{sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line; interwikis at Wikidata --> }}</includeonly>
<noinclude> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:WikiProject Articles for creation templates]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude> <noinclude> [[Category:Pages without wikidata]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>
